title: Daily Expansion
description: A mod/plugin that expands the world day by day with 20+ different chunks!
body:
You will started in a floating chunk, and the world will be expanded every day with one or more random chunk chosen in 100 different chunks (~20 currently in Fabric)!
## Requirement
 - Use void present for it to work.

The Fabric version is currently different from the Forge one: Fabric one is more optimized but less chunk plugin too.

### WARNING !!!
We haven't adapted this plugin for the Skyblock plugin yet, so we don't know what will happen, but in the future, we will definitely about it!
